overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt riding a horse through a medieval village at night. The journey progresses from torch-lit cobblestone streets through stone archways, past guards and villagers, across a stone bridge, and into the rural countryside with smoking kilns.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval village street with timber-framed buildings

agents.ego_description: riding horse through cobblestone village streets approaching a stone archway

notable_agents.action: guard in red uniform standing watch near building entrance

entered.detail: wet cobblestone road reflecting torchlight
medieval half-timbered houses with lit windows
burning torches mounted on building walls providing warm orange light
large stone archway marking tunnel entrance ahead
wooden fence railing along the street edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark medieval village street at night, with the camera following Geralt on horseback riding over wet cobblestones. Timber-framed buildings line both sides with warm torchlight glowing from wall sconces. Guards in red uniforms stand watch as the horse approaches a stone archway tunnel in the distance.

events.description: enters covered stone archway tunnel with torch-lit walls
exits tunnel back to open village street

agents.ego_description: riding horse through the covered stone tunnel passage

entered.detail: tunnel with brick and stone walls forming a covered passage
rough stone walls of the tunnel interior
burning torches mounted on tunnel walls

segments.scene_description: The horse enters a covered stone archway tunnel, transitioning from the open street to an enclosed passage. The tunnel walls are rough stone illuminated by regularly spaced torch sconces. The cobblestone street continues through the tunnel until emerging back into the open village.

scene_state.functional_zone: village exit gate and stone bridge crossing

events.description: passes through village exit gate with gathered crowd of villagers
crosses stone bridge over river leaving the village

agents.ego_description: riding through village exit gate and crossing the stone bridge

notable_agents.action: crowd of villagers gathered at the gate waving and cheering

entered.detail: large brick archway marking the village exit with guards standing watch
stone bridge crossing over water with moss-covered edges
dark flowing river visible beneath and beside the bridge
rural houses with thatched roofs visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the tunnel, the scene opens to the village exit gate where a crowd of villagers has gathered, waving as Geralt passes through. The horse continues onto a stone bridge crossing a river, leaving the main village behind. The lighting shifts to more open moonlight as the bridge spans the water toward rural outskirts.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural outskirts with wooden cottages and fences

events.description: passes through wooden archway structure marking village boundary

agents.ego_description: riding along dirt path through rural outskirts with wooden houses

entered.detail: unpaved dirt path with grass growing along the edges
simple wooden post fence lining the rural road
small wooden houses with shingled roofs
large wooden archway spanning the road marking the village boundary
white-barked birch trees scattered along the path

segments.scene_description: The horse leaves the stone bridge and transitions to a dirt road through rural outskirts. Wooden fences and small cottages line the path, with birch trees visible in the moonlight. The camera passes through a large wooden archway structure that marks the boundary of the village proper, entering the more open countryside.

scene_state.functional_zone: open countryside with smoking kilns and scattered shacks

agents.ego_description: riding through open countryside past smoking kilns and scattered buildings

entered.detail: stone kilns emitting white smoke into the night air
open grassy areas surrounding the dirt road
dark tree line of a forest visible on the horizon
simple wooden sheds and outbuildings

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into wide countryside with the horse riding past stone kilns billowing smoke into the night sky. The dirt road continues through grassy fields with scattered wooden shacks and a distant forest visible on the horizon under the cloudy night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the torch-lit interior of a medieval village out into the expansive, moonlit rural countryside. It begins on a dark street of wet cobblestones and timber-framed buildings, following Geralt on horseback past red-uniformed guards toward a stone archway. As the horse enters the enclosed stone tunnel, the open street gives way to rough walls illuminated by flickering sconces before emerging once more into the village air. The scene then opens toward the exit gate where waving villagers gather, shifting from warm torchlight to cool moonlight as the camera crosses a stone bridge over a river. Finally, the path transitions from the bridge to a dirt road lined with birch trees and wooden fences, passing through a boundary archway to reveal wide fields with smoking stone kilns and a distant forest under a cloudy night sky.
